accessibility.label: Inclusivity
accessibility.title: Care & Accessibility Commitment
accessibility.subtitle: Physically or Intellectually Disabled Clients
body: Ocean Noir believes that every individual's pursuit of intimacy, emotional connection, and pleasure deserves respect. We approach our guests with an open heart, and deeply understand that clients with physical or intellectual disabilities share the same desire for sensory fulfilment.

Our companions are trained to provide attentive, patient, and professional care — ensuring every guest experiences the dignity and pleasure they deserve. For guests with mobility requirements, we have thoughtfully created a dedicated accessible luxury suite on the Ground Floor ♿. Every passage, every detail has been considered — offering a seamless, fully private and barrier-free experience from arrival to departure. At Ocean Noir, true luxury knows no boundaries.

disclaimer.label: Legal
disclaimer.title: Legal Disclaimer
body: Ocean Noir is a fully registered and compliant business entity. Our primary service is the provision of premium space rental and the collection of corresponding venue usage fees.

Regarding payments, we follow a transparent two-part principle: (a) Payments made to Ocean Noir cover room rental and access to the premium amenities provided within the premises; (b) Fees paid to service providers are based on independent agreements and mutual consent reached between you and them regarding specific services.

Please be advised that each service provider operating within this venue is an independent self-employed individual. They are neither employees of Ocean Noir nor personnel engaged under any contractual arrangement with the company. No employment relationship of any kind exists between Ocean Noir and its service providers. Ocean Noir does not pay any wages or subsidies to service providers; all income earned by service providers comes directly from payments made by clients. This clear distinction is designed to ensure the independence and professionalism of all services.

sections.heading: 1. Age Restriction
sections.body: This website is intended for adults aged 18 years and over. By accessing this website, you confirm that you are of legal age in your jurisdiction. Ocean Noir reserves the right to refuse entry to any person who cannot verify their age.

sections.heading: 2. Information We Collect
sections.body: We may collect personal information (such as name and contact details) only when voluntarily provided by you for the purpose of enquiries or pre-registration. We also collect standard website access logs (IP address, browser type, pages visited) for security and analytics purposes.

sections.heading: 3. Confidentiality & No Records
sections.body: We guarantee complete confidentiality. Ocean Noir does not retain records of client visits, preferences, or transactions. Your privacy is our highest priority.

sections.heading: 4. Discreet Billing
sections.body: All card transactions are processed with discreet billing descriptions. The venue name or nature of business will not appear on your bank or credit card statement.

sections.heading: 5. No Third-Party Disclosure
sections.body: We will never sell, rent, or disclose your personal information to third parties, except where required by law.

sections.heading: 6. Cookies
sections.body: This website uses cookies to improve your browsing experience. By continuing to use the site, you consent to our use of cookies. You may disable cookies through your browser settings, though this may affect site functionality.

sections.heading: 7. Contact
sections.body: For any privacy-related enquiries, please contact us at oceannoir580@gmail.com.

sections.heading: 1. Age Verification
sections.body: You must be 18 years of age or older to access this website or enter our premises. By using this website, you confirm you meet this requirement. We reserve the right to request valid photo identification (passport or Australian driver's licence) upon entry.

sections.heading: 2. Conditions of Use
sections.body: By accessing this website, you agree to use it only for lawful purposes. You must not use this site to harass, defame, or offend others; transmit unlawful or offensive material; use automated scraping tools; or engage in any activity that violates applicable laws or regulations.

sections.heading: 3. Independent Service Providers
sections.body: All companions operating within Ocean Noir are independent self-employed individuals. They are not employees of Ocean Noir. Ocean Noir provides premium space rental and venue amenities only. Any service arrangements are made independently between guests and companions.

sections.heading: 4. Two-Part Fee Structure
sections.body: (a) Fees paid to Ocean Noir cover suite rental and access to all venue amenities. (b) Fees paid to companions are independently negotiated between the guest and the companion. Ocean Noir does not direct, control, or receive any portion of companion earnings.

sections.heading: 5. Copyright
sections.body: All content on this website — including images, text, and design — is the property of Ocean Noir and is protected by copyright law. Reproduction or distribution without prior written consent is prohibited.

sections.heading: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: Ocean Noir makes no warranties regarding the accuracy or completeness of information on this website. To the extent permitted by law, Ocean Noir is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential loss arising from your use of this website or our premises.

sections.heading: 7. Governing Law
sections.body: These terms are governed by the laws of New South Wales, Australia. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of NSW.

footer.legal: Adults only (18+). Fully licensed. Compliant with NSW regulations.
